title: GrowGeneration Reports Record Financial Results Q2 2020
text: GrowGeneration Q2 2020 Record Results. Q2 2020 marked record financial performance in company history. Strong revenue growth driven by increased demand for hydroponic and organic gardening products amid cannabis industry expansion. Company benefited from cannabis cultivator demand for growing supplies and equipment. Record earnings demonstrated successful execution of growth strategy and market expansion. Proprietary brands beginning to drive incremental margins. Strong cash generation supported continued expansion and acquisitions. Comparable store sales growth remained robust as company added locations. Results reflected cannabis industry tailwinds and consumer interest in home gardening.
